verdict: NO KV prefix reuse for Qwen3.5-9B on this llama.cpp build -> no prefill-warming lever

wall_clock_ttft_ms.note: Any cold-vs-repeat TTFT gap is a GPU-scheduling / first-after-idle artifact: the repeat still evaluates ~all prompt tokens (prompt_n above), i.e. the prefill compute is unchanged. It is NOT cache reuse and NOT a deployable speedup.

why: Qwen3.5-9B is hybrid/recurrent (GatedDeltaNet); its per-sequence recurrent state cannot be partially reused, so llama.cpp cannot reuse the KV prefix across requests. Corrected after codex-council round 3 caught the original over-attributed claim.
